title: Manager's Guide, Survey Results, and other smaller changes

texts: Slightly changed the layout of the Extraction Simulator.
Added tags/factions to the identity individual pages.
Changed Daily Random Team's tags/factions rule to select at least 5 tags/factions to prevent cases of the entire team being the same faction (esp when base ids are selected as a possible faction).
Added a small hint for tokens in Markdown Editors.
